meta.title: About MB Nettoyage — Marseille
meta.description: MB Nettoyage, a cleaning company in Marseille: home cleaning and professional cleaning, using natural products and equipment.

paragraphes: MB Nettoyage is a cleaning company based in Marseille, founded by Meriem Bouhofrat. It works with individuals and businesses alike: home cleaning, ironing and windows on one side, office, shop upkeep and post-construction cleaning on the other.

Every visit is carried out with natural products and equipment, respecting your home, your furniture and your habits. The goal is simple: a careful, lasting result, without compromising on the quality of the products used.

MB Nettoyage covers Marseille, Aix-en-Provence and a 20 km radius, available 24/7 to fit your schedule. A complementary range of cleaning products is in preparation, to extend this commitment to quality beyond each visit.

Room before post-construction cleaning, work equipment in place

items.texte: Natural products and equipment supplied, respectful of your home.
Discretion and reliability, at home as well as on your business premises.
Reachable 24/7, to fit your schedule.
Prices announced upfront and a free quote before any visit.

content.titre: Everything to know before getting started

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.reponse: For individuals: regular or one-off cleaning, deep cleaning, move-out cleaning, ironing and window cleaning. For businesses: office and shop upkeep, window cleaning and post-construction cleaning.

items.question: What area do you cover?
items.reponse: Marseille, Aix-en-Provence and roughly 20 km around these two towns.

items.question: How do I get a quote?
items.reponse: By phone, WhatsApp or our form: the quote is free and with no obligation, we reply quickly, 7 days a week.

items.question: Do you supply the equipment and products?
items.reponse: Yes, we bring our own equipment and natural products, suited to each visit.

items.question: Do your services qualify for the tax credit?
items.reponse: Yes, for cleaning, ironing and windows carried out at an individual's home: 50% of the amount is refunded or deducted from your taxes. Services for businesses are billed on quote, and are not eligible.

items.question: Do you offer a discount for a first appointment?
items.reponse: Yes, −15% applies to your first visit. A referral offer also gives you −€10, as well as the person you refer.

items.question: Are you available on weekends?
items.reponse: Yes, MB Nettoyage is available 24/7, to fit your schedule.

content.sousTitre: Call us or write to us: we reply quickly.

meta.title: 50% tax credit — home cleaning in Marseille
meta.description: MB Nettoyage's cleaning, ironing and window services carried out at an individual's home in Marseille are eligible for the 50% tax credit.

content.intro: Cleaning, ironing and window cleaning carried out at your home are eligible for the 50% tax credit under home care services rules.

content.argumentaire: For regular cleaning at home: €50/h billed, but only €25/h actually paid by you after the 50% tax credit.
points: 50% tax credit on home cleaning, ironing and windows
A tax certificate is issued to you every year
Only valid for services carried out at an individual's home
content.cardIntro: Estimate your real cost in a few seconds, tax credit deducted.
content.note: Indicative estimate, within the annual cap set by the tax administration for home care services.

items.question: How does the 50% tax credit work?
items.reponse: For cleaning, ironing and windows carried out at your home, you receive a tax credit equal to 50% of the amounts paid, under home care services rules.

items.question: Does this apply to services for businesses?
items.reponse: No. The tax credit only applies to services carried out at an individual's home. Office, shop and post-construction cleaning are billed on quote, without tax credit.

items.question: What do I need to do to benefit from it?
items.reponse: Nothing in particular: a certificate summarising the amounts paid is issued to you every year, to include in your tax return.

items.question: Is there a cap?
items.reponse: Yes, the tax credit applies within the annual caps set by the tax administration for home care services.

content.titre: Take advantage of the tax credit on your home cleaning
content.sousTitre: Free quote by phone, quick reply.

content.titre: A property ready to welcome, on every arrival
paragraphes: Seasonal rental, Airbnb, Booking or furnished tourist accommodation: between each stay, the property has to be spotless and ready within a short window. MB Nettoyage handles the full turnover between guests — floors, bathrooms, kitchen, dusting — with natural products and equipment.
Whether you own a single property or run a management company handling several, we adapt to your turnovers: one-off or recurring visits, coordinated with your check-outs and check-ins.

Visits coordinated with your check-ins / check-outs, one-off or regular.

items.texte: You let us know about the check-out: we schedule the visit within your window.

content.titre: Rentals covered in Marseille, Aix-en-Provence and 20 km around

items.question: Do you work with individual hosts and property managers?
items.reponse: Yes, both for an owner renting a single property and for a management company handling several.

items.question: Do you change the sheets and linen?
items.reponse: Yes, on request: sheets changed, beds made and towels renewed, according to your instructions and the linen you provide.

items.question: How is the price set?
items.reponse: On quote, based on the size of the property, how often turnovers happen and the services you need. Contact us for a free estimate.

items.question: Does this service qualify for the tax credit?
items.reponse: No. The 50% tax credit applies to cleaning at an individual's home; the upkeep of a property let on short-term rental is part of your rental activity and is not eligible.
